{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Ta dshwoja tee eekſch
to Amoriteru Semmes/ un iſ-
waddija wiſſus Eſboniterus ar
fawu Spehku : Tad gahje
tee zaur to Jordani/ un eeman-
toja wiſſas tahs Kalnu-Weetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Un tee iſdſinne fatwâ
Preekſchâ tohs Kananiterus/ un
tohs Weresiterus/ un tohs Jebu-
fiterus/ un tohs Sikemiterus/
uu wiſſus Gergesiterus/ un dsh-
twoja tnr ilgu Laiku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "17. Un kamehr tee preekſch
fawa Deewa ne apgrehkojahs/
tad teem labbi klahjahs / jo tas
Deews/ kas pee winneem irr/
centhſt to Netaifnibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "18. Bet kad tee atkahpe no
ta Zelko/ fo winsch teem bij pa-
wehejs/ tad irr tee zaur dauds
Karreem fohti apbehdinati / un
Zeetuma ueſweschu Semini ais-
westi/ un winzu Deewa Name
irr par pohsta Weetu tappis/ un
winnu Pilſfahti no teem Pret-
tineecekeem uſnemti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. Bet tuhdak/ kad tee pee
fawa Deewa attak atgreeſahs /
irr tee no tahm Weetahm / kur
tee iſkatſiti bija/ attak atnahkn-
fehi un Jerufalemmi eedabbuj-
ſchi / kur winzu fwehta Weeta
irr/ un par Eedshwotajcem to
Kalnu-Weetu tappuſcht/ jo tahs
bija pohsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Nu tad/ Kungâ un Wal-
ditajs/ kad jchee Laudis jaſchu
irr noseeguſcheeſ un prett tarwu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Deewn grehkojuſchi / tad g
bam topaſchu apdohmaht/ jo
teem buhs par Peedaufitcha
un mehſ zelſimeeſ/ un grih
tohs nowaldiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Bet kad pee winnu D
tas nebuhs Netaifnibas/ ta-
jelle mans Kungâ tezzen eet/
ne jaſchu winnu Deews
Kungâ tohs pafarga / un m
buſtim Kannâ preekſch wi
Pafaules.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "22. Kad nu Akioru mi-
jahs schohs Wahrdug runna
tad kurneja wiſt Laudis/ kaſ
tai Dshiwokli apkahrt stahwe
Un Oloweruns Leelt Kungi /
wiſſi/ kas eekſch tahm Wal-
pee Juhraſ un Moabâ dsh-
ja/ ſazzija / ka winnu bijjak-
vaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "23. Jo mehſ ne bihſtau-
preeſch teem Israëta Be-
neem/ jo rangi/ tee irr Laud-
kam Spehka newaid/ nedg W-
ra pee kahdas ſtipras Raufc-
nas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "24. Tadeht mehſ jelle ze-
meeſ/ tad tee buhs par wee-
Rummoſu wiſam tawam R-
ra-Spehkam/Kungâ Oloweru
"
    }
  ],
